## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph summary of the change -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` New command or API support
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `perf:` Performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor:` Code change with no user-facing impact
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only
- [ ] `test:` Tests only
- [ ] `chore:` Build, CI, or tooling

## Testing

- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Manually tested against Daraja sandbox

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] No credentials, keys, or secrets committed
- [ ] `--debug` output looks correct for new HTTP calls
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
